subjects.title: Constitutional Law I
subjects.description: Fundamental Rights, Directive Principles, constitutional history, Preamble and amendment procedure.

subjects.title: Law of Contracts
subjects.description: Indian Contract Act 1872 — offer, acceptance, consideration, void agreements, breach and remedies.

subjects.title: Legal Methods and Research
subjects.description: Legal reasoning, case analysis, statutory interpretation, research methodology and citation.

subjects.title: Family Law I
subjects.description: Hindu Marriage Act 1955, Hindu Succession Act 1956, Muslim personal law and adoption.

subjects.title: Law of Torts
subjects.description: Tort liability, negligence, defamation, nuisance, strict and absolute liability.

subjects.title: Political Science
subjects.description: Political thought, constitutional governance, federalism, separation of powers and state theory.

subjects.title: Constitutional Law II
subjects.description: Federal structure, emergency provisions, constitutional amendments and parliamentary procedure.

subjects.title: Administrative Law
subjects.description: Delegated legislation, judicial review, natural justice and administrative tribunals.

subjects.title: Criminal Law I — BNS 2023
subjects.description: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita — general exceptions, offences against state, body and property.

subjects.title: Jurisprudence
subjects.description: Legal theory, schools of jurisprudence, concept of rights, duties and legal personality.

subjects.title: Transfer of Property Law
subjects.description: Transfer of Property Act 1882 — sale, mortgage, lease, gift and exchange.

subjects.title: Criminal Law II — BNSS 2023
subjects.description: Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita — investigation, trial, bail, appeals and sentencing.

subjects.title: Code of Civil Procedure
subjects.description: CPC 1908 — suits, jurisdiction, pleadings, appeals, revision and execution of decrees.

subjects.title: Law of Evidence — BSA 2023
subjects.description: Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam — relevancy, admissibility, witnesses and electronic evidence.
